next_operator_commands: PYTHONPATH=.:src python -m bloombee.cli.run_server Qwen/Qwen3-8B --new_swarm --block_indices 0:18 --device mps --torch_dtype float16 --port 31337 2>&1 | tee .local/qwen3-8b-clean-server-0.log

PYTHONPATH=.:src python -m bloombee.cli.run_server Qwen/Qwen3-8B --initial_peers '<PASTE_SEED_MULTIADDR>' --block_indices 18:36 --device mps --torch_dtype float16 --port 31338 2>&1 | tee .local/qwen3-8b-clean-server-1.log

notes: Server 0 starts a private swarm; later servers bootstrap to server 0's multiaddr.
The client command needs every server multiaddr so RemoteSequential can discover all blocks.
Do not update PROOF_STATUS.yaml until verify mode returns status=passed.

PYTHONPATH=.:src python -m bloombee.cli.run_server Qwen/Qwen3-8B --initial_peers '<PASTE_SEED_MULTIADDR>' --block_indices 18:36 --device mps --torch_dtype float16 --port 31338 2>&1 | tee .local/qwen3-8b-clean-server-1.log
